subject: Cannot login after password reset
description: I have been unable to login since yesterday morning after being forced to reset my password. The reset email arrived but entering the new password gives an invalid credentials error.

subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
description: My invoice for March shows a charge of $299 but I am on the $199 plan. Please review and issue a corrected invoice or refund the difference.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately on launch after the latest update. It worked fine on version 3.1.2. Device is iPhone 15 running iOS 17.4.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
description: My 2FA codes from the authenticator app are always rejected. I have tried regenerating the secret and syncing my phone clock but the issue persists.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: It would be great to have a dark mode option in the settings. Many users in our organisation work in low-light environments and would benefit from this.

subject: Payment declined despite valid card
description: My credit card payment keeps failing with error code CARD_DECLINED even though my bank confirms there are no blocks on the card and sufficient funds are available.

subject: Slow dashboard loading
description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load since the Tuesday deployment. All other pages load normally. This is blocking our team from doing their daily work.

subject: Cannot export data to CSV
description: The export to CSV button on the reports page does nothing when clicked. There is no error message and no download is triggered. I have tried Chrome Firefox and Safari.

subject: Wrong currency displayed
description: My account is set to EUR but all prices are displaying in USD. This started after I updated my billing address last week.

subject: Request for bulk user import
description: We need to onboard 500 new users. Could you add support for bulk user import via CSV? We can provide the format you need.

subject: API key not working
description: My API key stopped working two days ago. I have regenerated it three times but every call returns 401 Unauthorized. Our integrations are completely broken.

subject: Subscription upgrade not reflected
description: I upgraded from Starter to Pro three days ago and was charged but the Pro features are still not available in my account.

subject: Account locked after failed logins
description: My account got locked after several failed login attempts. I know my password is correct. Please unlock the account and explain the lockout policy.

subject: Bug in date filter
description: When I set the date filter to a custom range the results include tickets outside that range. Steps: go to tickets page set date from 2026-01-01 to 2026-01-31 and dates from February appear.

subject: Email notifications not arriving
description: I stopped receiving email notifications for ticket updates about a week ago. My email address is correct in settings and I have checked spam folders.

subject: Refund not processed after 15 days
description: I was promised a refund on 15 April and it has now been 15 days with no credit to my account. Order reference RF-2026-0415.

subject: Cannot change account email
description: The change email form accepts my new address and says the change was successful but my account still shows the old email after refreshing.

subject: Request: webhook support
description: Please add webhook support so we can receive real-time events when tickets are created or updated. This is essential for our workflow automation.

subject: Search returns irrelevant results
description: The search feature returns tickets that do not contain the search term at all. Searched for the word invoice and got unrelated account tickets.

subject: Billing address update failing
description: Every time I try to update my billing address the form shows a spinner and then resets without saving. I have tried on three different browsers.

subject: Production outage: service down
description: Our entire production environment is down. All API calls return 503. This is causing significant revenue loss. Need immediate escalation.

subject: SSO configuration not working
description: We are trying to set up SAML SSO with our identity provider but keep getting a signature verification error. Our IdP metadata is correctly uploaded.

subject: Incorrect tax calculation
description: The system is calculating 20% VAT on my invoices but I am in a region where the correct rate is 5%. My account country is set correctly.

subject: Feature request: audit log
description: We need a detailed audit log showing who changed what and when for compliance purposes. This is a requirement for our ISO 27001 certification.

subject: Cannot delete old tickets
description: The delete button on archived tickets is greyed out. We need to remove old test tickets to keep our workspace clean.

subject: Password reset email not received
description: I requested a password reset three times and have not received any email. I have checked spam and all my other email is working fine.

subject: Duplicate charges on account
description: I see two identical charges of $149 on my account on 2026-04-01. I only have one active subscription. Please investigate and refund the duplicate.

subject: App performance degraded
description: Since the last release the web application is noticeably slower. Page loads that used to take 1 second now take 5-8 seconds. CPU usage on our end is normal.

subject: Feature request: custom fields
description: We would like to add custom fields to tickets to track project codes and client references. This is important for our billing reconciliation.

subject: Cannot access admin panel
description: I am an administrator but I get an access denied error when trying to open the admin panel. My role shows as Admin in my profile.

subject: Overage charges not explained
description: My bill this month is $450 higher than usual due to overages but the breakdown in my invoice does not show what triggered them.

subject: Bug: notifications sent to wrong user
description: My colleague received email notifications for tickets assigned to me. This is a privacy concern and needs to be fixed immediately.

subject: Request: multi-language support
description: Our customers are based in Spain and France. We would love the interface to support Spanish and French in addition to English.

subject: Account data not syncing
description: Data entered on the web app is not appearing in the mobile app even after waiting several minutes and force-refreshing. Sync seems completely broken.

subject: Discount code not applied
description: I entered promo code SAVE20 at checkout but the 20% discount was not applied and I was charged the full amount.

subject: Locked out of organisation account
description: I am the owner of our organisation account but I am getting a session expired error on every login attempt. Other team members can log in fine.

subject: Data export is incomplete
description: The data export I ran yesterday only contains 1200 records but our account has over 5000. The export finished without any error message.

subject: Request: SLA tracking
description: We need SLA tracking so we can see which tickets have breached their response time targets. This is critical for our support team KPIs.

subject: Payment gateway error at checkout
description: Every attempt to pay shows a Gateway timeout GW-504 error at the final checkout step. I have tried three different cards.

subject: Session expires too quickly
description: My session expires after about 5 minutes of inactivity even though I have not changed any timeout settings. This is very disruptive during long form fills.

subject: Cannot upload profile picture
description: The profile picture upload shows a progress bar that reaches 100% and then resets without saving the image. File size is 180KB which is within the limit.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed without notice
description: My annual subscription was auto-renewed and I was charged $1200 without any renewal reminder email. I want to cancel and request a refund.

subject: Bug in timezone display
description: Ticket timestamps display in UTC even though my account timezone is set to America/New_York. All times are 5 hours ahead of what they should be.

subject: Need GDPR data deletion
description: Under GDPR Article 17 I am requesting deletion of all personal data associated with my account within 30 days.

subject: Cannot share reports with team
description: The share button on reports opens a modal but clicking Share does nothing. No error message appears and nothing is shared.

subject: Wrong plan displayed in billing
description: My billing page shows I am on the Enterprise plan but I only signed up for the Business plan. I am worried I will be charged the Enterprise price.

subject: Feature request: time tracking
description: It would be very useful to have built-in time tracking on tickets so agents can log how long they spend on each issue.

subject: Critical security vulnerability
description: I discovered that it is possible to view other users' tickets by incrementing the ticket ID in the URL. This is a critical security issue.

subject: Renewal price higher than quoted
description: When I renewed my subscription I was charged $299/month but the price quoted during renewal was $249/month. Please honour the quoted price.

subject: Integration with Jira broken
description: Our Jira integration stopped syncing tickets three days ago. The settings page shows the connection as active but no tickets are being created in Jira.
